name: Minecraft Java
author: panel@bytedock.local
description: Minecraft Java Edition server. Supports Paper, Spigot, Vanilla, and Forge via the itzg/minecraft-server image.

variables.name: Server Type
variables.description: The type of Minecraft server to run.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version to run. Use LATEST for the latest version.

variables.name: Max Memory (MB)
variables.description: Maximum RAM allocated to the server in megabytes.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: Message of the Day shown in the server list.

variables.name: EULA
variables.description: Accept the Minecraft EULA. Must be TRUE to run.
